summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of E26 Media multi-page upgrade. All 9 backend pytest tests passed (leads CRUD, admin auth, stats). All 14 UI flows passed including routing, services dropdown, service detail pages, invalid-slug redirect, portfolio filters, project modal, contact form submission with persistence verified end-to-end via admin API.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: AdminLogin/LeadCreate use plain str for email - consider EmailStr (pydantic[email]) for stronger validation
server.py: create_lead returns response_model=Lead but model has alias _id; alias is serialized fine since populate_by_name=True, but consider exposing only 'id' to clients for consistency
server.py: @app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in favor of lifespan handlers in FastAPI 0.110+
ContactForm uses native <select> which is fine, but inconsistent with shadcn components used elsewhere; not a blocker
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test leads: TEST_User_* (via API) and UI Test 1782468357 (via UI form). Confirmed presence in admin /api/admin/leads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_e26_backend.py and run via pytest. Multi-page routing verified: /, /services, /services/:slug (4 slugs: web-design-development, software-development, mobile-app-development, digital-marketing), /portfolio, /about, /contact. Invalid service slug redirects to /services. Contact form is a native HTML select (use select_option) not shadcn. Services dropdown items use data-testid prefix navigation-services-dropdown-*. Portfolio cards use portfolio-project-button-{id}.
verified_flows: Sticky nav with NavLinks routing (no full reload)
Services dropdown shows 4 items, each with /services/:slug href
Service detail pages render and load (web-design-development verified)
Contact: WhatsApp wa.me link present, Google Map iframe present
Contact form submit returns success alert + sonner toast
